landing.title: Ello Bot
landing.subtitle: A cleaner shell for agent security, workspace access, and long-lived sessions.
landing.headline: Secure access for people, agents, and workspaces.
landing.panel.authDescription: Access and refresh tokens now rotate through the security service instead of the legacy single-token flow.
landing.panel.tenantsDescription: Switch between visible tenants and keep the active workspace attached to every authenticated request.
landing.panel.profileDescription: Update your profile, avatar, and password without leaving the product shell.
dashboard.title: Overview
dashboard.description: Review workspace scope, active sessions, and agent access from one place.
dashboard.securityDescription: Sessions, workspace scope, and operator safety signals.
dashboard.switchWorkspaceHint: Choose the tenant scope that should back your current session.
dashboard.createWorkspaceHint: Create a new tenant and jump into it immediately.
dashboard.quickActionsTitle: Move straight to the next task.
dashboard.manageProfileHint: Edit display name, bio, timezone, and personal details.
dashboard.manageMembersHint: Inspect who is visible inside the current tenant.
dashboard.manageAccessHint: Open agents, people, capability rules, and runtime overrides.
dashboard.securitySessionsHint: These are the currently active sessions attached to your principal.
dashboard.emptySessions: No active sessions were returned by the backend.
language.label: Language
shell.securityHint: Session recovery, tenant context, and agent access controls are active in this shell.
notifications.signedOutAllSessions: All active sessions were revoked for this principal.
